# ASO Checklist: 30 Steps to Optimize Your Listing | AppDrift

## Summary
30-step actionable ASO checklist published April 2026. Covers metadata (title, subtitle, keyword field), screenshot production (all slots, captions, localization), icon testing, description optimization, A/B testing cadence, and keyword tracking frequency. Introduces a 2026-specific ranking factor: screenshot text overlays are now indexed by both Apple and Google for search relevance.

## Key quotations / statistics
- "Your app title is the single most heavily weighted ranking signal on both platforms. Apple allows 30 characters; Google Play allows 50. Lead with your primary keyword."
- **2026 new ranking factor:** "Both Apple and Google now index text overlays on screenshots for search relevance. That means the captions you add to your screenshots serve a dual purpose: they persuade users AND help you rank for additional keywords."
- "Both Apple and Google allow up to 10 screenshots per device type. Use all available slots — there is no scenario where fewer screenshots convert better than more."
- "Apple allows up to 70 Custom Product Pages per app, each with its own screenshots, app preview video, and promotional text."
- "Always have at least one test running. Start with screenshots (highest impact), then test icon variations, then subtitle/short description copy. Run each test for a minimum of 7 days to reach statistical significance."
- "For a new app launch, prioritize these five items: (1) keyword-optimized title using 25–30 characters with your primary keyword, (2) all 100 characters used in the iOS keyword field, (3) at least 6 high-quality screenshots showing your core value proposition in the first 3 frames, (4) a description that hooks readers in the first paragraph, and (5) localization in at least 10 languages to maximize global reach from day one."

## Annotations for stinger-forge
- The screenshot caption indexing discovery (2026 new factor) is a critical update for `guides/01-aso-strategy.md` — it changes the ROI calculation for screenshot design. Captions are now both conversion AND discovery assets.
- The five-item priority list for new app launch is a ready-made "minimum viable ASO" checklist that stinger-forge can embed directly in the guide.
- The 70 Custom Product Pages cap and A/B testing minimum of 7 days are concrete operational parameters that belong in the ASO guide.
- This source is newer (April 2026) than the ScreenMagic and Applyra sources, which makes it the freshest citation for these specifics.
